headline: Research Scientist & Epidemiologist at CIPH | Urban Respiratory Illness Surveillance | URISN
summary: Epidemiologist and Research Scientist at the Chesapeake Institute of Public Health. PI on the URISN study — a multi-year surveillance network tracking respiratory infection patterns across Baltimore neighborhoods. Co-investigator on two additional CIPH projects. Ph.D. Epidemiology, Kensington University (2022). I care about neighborhood-level health equity and making surveillance data legible to the people it describes.
